goals.title: H1
goals.objective: Translate ccb-provider-finish-hook (313L python) to a Rust binary invoked by ccb-provider-hooks; verify the Rust hooks crate resolves it
goals.evidence: rust/tools/ccb-provider-finish-hook binary (1:1 port of python); exported current_turn_req_id_from_transcript; build_hook_command/build_activity_hook_command support empty python_executable for binary-direct invocation; clippy clean, provider-hooks tests pass

goals.title: H2
goals.objective: Translate ccb-provider-activity-hook (176L) + ccb-cleanup (17L) python scripts to Rust binaries
goals.evidence: activity-hook + cleanup binaries committed; clippy clean; workspace 1393 tests pass

goals.title: I1
goals.objective: De-Python install.sh — keep cargo build, drop the hard Python 3.10+ requirement (watchdog/tomli/metadata-encode moved off python or made optional)
goals.evidence: install.sh de-Python: require_python_version soft-warn; core Rust install Python-free; optional features degrade gracefully

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/plans/1781439024980-phase-rust-non-python-integration-debt/goals.json: G001-h1 H1; G002-h2 H2; G003-i1 I1
